evidence: HbA1c above target despite stable oral diabetes medication.
findings.recommendation: Define an exact HbA1c range or threshold for eligibility.

findings.finding: Renal impairment exclusion criterion lacks an operational threshold.
findings.recommendation: Define the threshold using eGFR, creatinine clearance, or another measurable criterion.

findings.finding: Study design, randomization, blinding, and comparator details are not specified.
findings.evidence: No structured study design field or criterion-level design detail found.
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether the study is randomized, blinded, placebo-controlled, active-comparator, or single-arm.

findings.finding: Recruitment assumption is provided without feasibility rationale.
findings.evidence: Single-center hospital-based recruitment, 80 participants over 6 months.
findings.recommendation: Add screening pool, historical recruitment rate, or site feasibility evidence.

findings.finding: Current injectable diabetes therapy exclusion may reduce the eligible recruitment pool.
evidence: Current use of injectable diabetes therapy.
findings.recommendation: Estimate how many otherwise eligible patients would be excluded and clarify whether this criterion is clinically necessary.

findings.finding: Follow-up visit attendance criterion needs an operational definition.
evidence: Able to attend scheduled follow-up visits.
findings.recommendation: Define required visit windows, acceptable missed visits, remote visit options, and how attendance feasibility will be assessed.

findings.finding: Safety monitoring plan is not specified.
findings.evidence: No safety monitoring field or monitoring process found.
findings.recommendation: Clarify adverse event review, safety labs, stopping rules if applicable, and responsible reviewers.

findings.finding: Prior GLP-1 receptor agonist exposure is not addressed in eligibility criteria.
findings.evidence: No inclusion or exclusion criterion refers to prior GLP-1 receptor agonist exposure.
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether prior or recent GLP-1 receptor agonist use is allowed, excluded, or stratified.

findings.finding: Adverse events are listed as data items, but the capture workflow is unclear.
findings.evidence: Expected data collection items include adverse events.
findings.recommendation: Specify how adverse events will be captured, reviewed, coded, and reconciled.
